name: Gateway Golf Rentals
about: Gateway Golf Rentals provides mobile golf simulator services delivered and set up at client locations throughout the St. Louis area. They specialize in event-based rentals for parties, corporate gatherings, and social occasions, offering a high-end simulator experience without requiring guests to travel to a fixed facility. The service includes standard, premium, and gold packages, each offering different levels of challenges, player capacity, and amenities such as prizes and event photography, with the option to add extra hours at $100 per hour.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient mobile delivery and setup service
High-end simulator technology for a premium experience
Variety of event packages to accommodate different group sizes and occasions
All-inclusive service with challenges, prizes, and photography options
